creator: julienabeille@yahoo.fr
text:
I just upgraded from 6.0 to 6.1 (same problem with 6.2 stable). I reboot
without problems, but when i start X, the screen is black and the keyboard
locked. ctrl-Alt-backspace or ctrl-alt-f1 does not do anything.  
My laptop is a thinkpad T43

Fix: 

I removed the radeon module from /boot/kernel and then x starts without
problems.
How-To-Repeat: every time i start X
